nasb.text: But turning around and seeing His disciples, He rebuked Peter and *said, “Get behind Me, Satan; for you are not setting your mind on God’s interests, but man’s.”

esv.text: But turning and seeing his disciples, he rebuked Peter and said, “Get behind me, Satan! For you are not setting your mind on the things of God, but on the things of man.”

cnv.text: 耶穌轉過身來，望著門徒，斥責彼得說：“撒但，退到我後面去！因為你不思念　神的事，只思念人的事。”

ccb.text: 耶稣转身看了看门徒，斥责彼得说：“撒旦，退到我后面去！因为你不考虑上帝的意思，只考虑人的意思。”

csbs.text: 但耶稣转过身，看了看他的门徒们，就斥责彼得，说：“撒旦，退到我后面去！因为你不是思想神的事，而是思想人的事。”
